title: Ensure podman temp directory is created on Start as well.
body:
`getRuntimeDir()` (which is also responsible for creating TMPDIR if it doesn't exist) was being called on `Init()` but not on `Start()` which meant that after the host was restarted and TMPDIR was wiped, `startHostNetworking()` would try to start gvproxy and immediately bail.

Fixes #21288

comments.body: Building succeeds, but not sure how, or even if tests should be addressed at this juncture. Brent Baude originally changed how `getRuntimeDir()` worked 3 months ago, and the change specifically said no new tests. I checked the test directory and there's nothing to jump off of for testing `machine` beyond `init`. Any recommendations?
Make the small change and repush, I added the NO NEW TESTS NEEDED flag.
